name: OSTEOCHONDROSIS DISSECANS
definition: OSTEOCHONDRITIS DISSECANS = OSTEOCHONDRAL FRACTURE fragmentation + possible separation of a portion of the articular surface disease manifestation before physeal closure

demographics.Location: posterior region of knee joint, olecranon fossa, axillary / subscapular recess of

dominant_finding: focus of abnormal signal in subarticular marrow
distribution: posterior region of knee joint, olecranon fossa, axillary / subscapular recess of
discriminating_features: purely cartilaginous fragment unrecognized on plain film
mouse bed = sclerosed pit in articular surface

general: purely cartilaginous fragment unrecognized on plain film
mouse bed = sclerosed pit in articular surface
MR: focus of abnormal signal in subarticular marrow
loose bodies of heterogeneous low-SI in coronoid and olecranon fossa outlined by
signs of lesion instability (= high-grade lesion):
line of fluid signal intensity on T2WI between fragment + parent bone surrounded by
flattening of anterior border of capitellum
